title: Resolution extending deepest sympathy and condolences to the family, relatives and friends of former Vice Mayor, the Honorable Procopio ?Copie? Alvarez, Alipon who passed away last October 15,2019 and recognizing all of his contributions for the betterment of the General Welfare of the people in the Municipality of Los Baños. (Authors: Councilor(s) Josephine S. Evangelista, Miko C. Pelegrina, Janos S. Lapiz, Geronimo A. Ciceron, Mike Dexter A. Concio, Mark Lester B. Dizon, Cris Dayrill B. Bagne
